category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a command-line interface for qBittorrent written in Go.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is qbittorrent-cli; official GitHub README title uses qbittorrent-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the main documentation surface and includes configuration and usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ludviglundgren/qbittorrent-cli, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies qBittorrent CLI and Go; official README describes managing torrents, categories, tags, and qBittorrent operations.
